---
title: "TITLE"
author: "Ebony Hunt"
date: "2026-05-22"
output:
  pdf_document: 
    keep_tex: true
  html_document: default
header-includes:
  \usepackage{placeins}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(tsibble)
library(feasts)
library(fable)
library(ggplot2)
library(forecast)
```

### GitHub Repository:

### <https://github.com/a1926113/Time_Series_Report>
